name: @chbrain/khai-engine-stigma
description: khai engine content, the stigma domain: a deeply discrediting attribute that reduces the bearer, in others' eyes, from a whole and usual person to a tainted, discounted one -- and the bearer's stance toward managing it.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Stigma as piece: a deeply discrediting attribute carried by a persona, spoiling their social identity in others' eyes -- the bearer's stance toward it, the discounting it triggers in interaction, and the work of managing a mark that can still be hidden.

card.wire: Attaches at Piece. The anchor (piece_stigma.md) declares the stigma as what it is in the room: an attribute deeply discrediting enough to reduce the bearer from a whole and usual person to a tainted, discounted one. The law makes the mark a thing the scene reads, not a private fact the persona merely holds.
card.issue: The mark, read three ways beneath the fact. One position names who carries it (the bearer, holding a spoiled identity); two processes name what happens around it -- the discounting the mark triggers once it is read (discrediting), and the standing work of managing a mark that is not yet known (passing). The attribute is the piece; the members are the interaction it distorts.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the engine. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor, so a stigma is read as discrediting wherever it sits. The link: the persona who carries it links the bearer stance and the process it is in under Projection.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared and a real bearer position or stigma process is linked. Whether the mark actually discredits the way the scene needs is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then place the stigma: name the attribute, whether the room already reads it or the bearer still controls its disclosure, and which process it is in -- being discounted in the interaction, or being managed out of view. Read it in the room's discount and in what the bearer will not let show.
